# Blood of Númenor

> [!info] 💧 Attachment · Cost: **0** · Spirit

*Condition.*

---

Attach to a **_Gondor_** or **_Dúnedain_** hero.
**Action:** Spend 1 resource from attached hero's resource pool to give attached hero +1 DEF for each resource in its resource pool until the end of the phase. (Limit once per phase.)

---

> *"Believe not that in the land of Gondor the blood of Numenor is spent, nor all its pride and dignity forgotten."*
> — Boromir, The Fellowship of the Ring

**Pack:** [[Heirs of Númenor]] #13
